title: Eco-friendly rapid vessel cleanser
abstract: A device (101) for washing and drying vessels (102) includes an holder (103) which holds one or more vessel (102) onto it in an upside-down position, a plurality of jet spray nozzles (104) located in such a way to spray a pre-heated fluid jets (128) inside (116) of the vessel (102), as well outside (117) of the vessel (102), and a movement means (105) which is enabled to generate a relative movement between the pre-heated fluid jets (128) and the vessel (102).
claims:
Claims Patent Claims 1. A device (101) for washing and drying vessels (102) comprises: - an holder (103) adapted to hold one or more vessel (102) onto it in an upside-down position; - a plurality of jet spray nozzles (104) located in such a way to spray a pre -heated fluid jets (128) inside (116) of the vessel (102), as well outside (117) of the vessel (102); and - a movement means (105) enabled to generate a relative movement between the pre -heated fluid jets (128) and the vessel (102). 2. The device (101) according to the claim 1, wherein the device (101) operates to at least one of the operations for washing the vessel (102) for a washing period of less than 15 seconds, for moving the vessel (102) to be in or out of the position for carrying out washing or drying for a movement period of less than 15 seconds, or for drying the vessel (102) for a drying period of less than 15 seconds. 3. The device (101) according to the claim 1, wherein the plurality of jet spray nozzles (104) is adapted to spray at least one of a water, a solvent, a mixture of solvent and water, an air, a steam, or combination thereof. 4. The device according to the claim 1 comprises: - a microcontroller (106) adapted to control at least a flow of pre-heated fluid through the jet spray nozzles (104). 5. The device (101) according to the claim 4 comprises: - at least one of a door sensor (107), a drainage sensor (108), a solvent sensor (109), or combination thereof, wherein the solvent sensor (107) is adapted to sense an amount of a solvent used for washing and to generate a solvent data (110), the door sensor (108) is adapted to count a number of times the door is opened and/or closed and to generate a usage data (111), the drainage sensor (109) is adapted to identify a flow or blockage from a drainage outlet to outside of the device and to generate a drainage data (112). 6. The device (101) according to the claim 5, wherein the microcontroller (106) is adapted to receive and process at least one of the solvent data (110), the usage data (111), or the drainage data (112), or combination thereof, and to control the functioning of the device (101). 7. The device (101) according to the claim 1, wherein the jet spray nozzles (104) are placed and/or oriented in such a way to spray the pre -heated fluid jets (128) onto at least a rim (114) of the vessel (102), or a base (115) of the vessel (102), or combination thereof. 8. The device (101) according to the claim 1 comprising: - a fluid pump (118) adapted to pump up the pre -heated fluid jets (128) up to the jet spray nozzles (104) at a pressure of 40 psi or above. 9. The device (101) according to the claim 1 comprising: - a heater (119) adapted to heat fluids before dispensing the jet of fluids through the jet spray nozzles (104). 10. The device according to the claim 1 comprising: - a vessel dispensing means (120) adapted to bring a placement means (127) into at least one of a first position (129) to allow access to the placement means (127) for placing the vessel (102) onto the placement means (127) or removing the vessel (102) from the placement means (127), or a second position (130) to bring the placement means (127) in cooperation to the holder (103) for transferring the vessel (102) from the placement means (127)to the holder (103). 11. The device (101) according to the claim 10 comprising - a proximity sensor (121) adapted to identity presence of the vessel (102) near to the device (101), 

 wherein the device (101) is adapted to enable the vessel dispensing means (120) to bring the placement means (127) in the first position based on the identification by the proximity sensor (121). 12. The device (101) according to the claim 1 comprising: - a venting means (122) adapted to be enabled before starting drying of the vessel (102) for sucking out fluids from inside the device (101). 13. The device (101) according to the claim 1 comprising: - a heated desiccant (123) adapted to dehumidify the air before starting the drying of the vessel (102). 14. The device (101) according to the claim 1 comprising: - a vision sensor or camera (124) adapted to capture one or more first images (125) of the vessel (102) before starting of the washing of the vessel (102), and one or more second images (126) after completion of the washing of the vessel (102), wherein the images (125, 126) are processed to determine a quality of washing of the vessel (102) in real time. 15. A batch cleaning system (201) of vessels (102) comprising: - a pre-wash placement means (202) adapted to receive more than one vessel (102), and further adapted to move the vessels (102); - a device (101) for washing and drying the vessels (102) comprising: - a placement means (127) adapted to receive one or more vessels (102) from the pre wash placement means (202), - a holder (104) adapted to be in cooperation with the placement means (127) to receive the one or more vessels (102) and to hold the one or more vessels (102) onto it in an upside-down position; - a plurality of jet spray nozzles (104) located in such a way to spray pre-heated fluid jets (128) inside (116) of the vessel (102), as well outside (117) of the vessel (102); and 

 - a movement means (105) enabled to generate a relative movement between the pre heated fluid jets (128) and the vessel (102). 16. A cleaning system (301) of vessels (102) comprising: - a device (101) for washing and drying vessels (102) comprises: - an holder (103) adapted to hold one or more vessels (102) onto it in an upside-down position; - a plurality of jet spray nozzles (104) located in such a way to spray a pre -heated fluid jets (128) inside (116) of the vessel (102), as well outside (117) of the vessel (102); - a movement means (105) enabled to generate a relative movement between the pre heated fluid jets (128) and the vessel (102); - a memory unit (113) adapted to store one or more types of data which are representative of at least one of a user input data (302) received as input for operating parameters, a sensor data (303) generated by one or more sensors present in the device (101), an operating data (304) generated while the vessel (102) is being operate by the device (101), or a usage data generated while using of the device (101), or combination thereof; and - a remote processing device (305) adapted to receive and process the one or more types of data and to predict at least a usage pattern data (306), a maintenance requirement data (307) for the device, a demand of ingredients data (308) used for making a dish served in the vessel (102), or combination thereof.
